meaning: n.四海为家的人,世界主义者adj.世界性的,全球(各地)的
examples: It wasn't just poking fun at Sally, but the whole idea that our school is sort of rural, and you know, not cosmopolitan.
The club has a cosmopolitan atmosphere.
Many internationals come to study, work and even retire here, adding a zest to this already cosmopolitan metropolis.
By 1924 he had become an international celebrity, featured in publications like Cosmopolitan and the Saturday Evening Post.
